phrases.intent_en: Ask where the interpretation centre is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le centre d'interprétation ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh SAHN-truh dahn-tair-pray-tah-SYOHN
phrases.cultural_note: The interpretation centre near Place Royale provides context about the founding of New France.

responses.english: Right across, on the other side.
responses.phonetic: zhoost ahn FAHSS duh LOH-truh koh-TAY
responses.local: Juste en face, de l'autre côté.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the interpretation centre is
phrases.text_local: Le centre d'interprétation de Place Royale, c'est par où ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh SAHN-truh dan-tair-pray-tah-SYON duh PLASS rwah-YAHL say par OO
phrases.cultural_note: The Interpretation Centre tells the story of 400 years of French-Canadian urban life and has bilingual interactive exhibits inside a beautifully restored building.

responses.english: Right across, on the other side.
responses.phonetic: zhoost ahn FAHSS duh LOH-truh koh-TAY
responses.local: Juste en face, de l'autre côté.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a photo with a historical character actor
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que je peux avoir une photo avec vous ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KUH zhuh puh ah-VWAHR OON fo-TOH ah-VEK VOO
phrases.cultural_note: In summer, costumed historical interpreters portray early French settlers and gladly pose for photos. A charming and educational encounter.

responses.english: You need to ask them directly.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find authentic Québec artisan goods
phrases.text_local: Y'a des boutiques d'artisanat québécois dans le coin ?
phrases.pronunciation: yah day boo-TEEK dar-tee-zah-NAH kay-bay-KWAH dahn luh KWAN
phrases.cultural_note: The streets around Place Royale have galleries and shops selling local crafts, Inuit art, and handmade goods. Look for the Conseil des métiers d'art label.

responses.english: There are shops on Petit-Champlain Street.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day boo-TEEK ROO doo puh-TEE shahm-PLAHN
responses.local: Il y a des boutiques rue du Petit-Champlain.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Lévis ferry from nearby
phrases.text_local: La traverse pour Lévis, c'est encore loin d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah trah-VAIRSS poor lay-VEE say ahn-KOR LWAH dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Lévis-Québec ferry departs from just below Place Royale and offers one of the best views of Château Frontenac for a minimal fare.

responses.english: The dock is at the bottom of the hill.
responses.phonetic: luh KAY eh tahn BAH duh lah KOHT
responses.local: Le quai est en bas de la côte.
